rules: Catalog metadata is authoritative for external engine registration; upstream git submodules are optional pins under external/knowledge-engines/upstream/{vendorId}.
SDKWork handlers and services MUST NOT call vendor HTTP APIs directly; only approved adapter crates may integrate upstream code or APIs.
Native OKF and native RAG engines are NOT listed in this catalog; they are defined in specs/knowledge-engine-spi.spec.json.
Adding a vendor requires engine.manifest.json, catalog.manifest.json entry, and passing tools/check_external_knowledge_engine_catalog.mjs.

Adapter and production tiers require executable health success/degradation, search, read, and unsupported-list contract evidence; production tier additionally requires version-pinned live certification evidence.
